title: Spacer Bar
original_text: The spacer bar was filled by the human white-noise of conversation and revelry. Ad-holos buzzed softly from ceiling-mounted projectors, shining garish highlights through glasses and bottles as crews mingled with merchants and locals trading drink for rumors, jobs, and connections.
translated_text: Tout port a son bar. C'est là que les contrats se négocient, que les rumeurs circulent et que les fortunes se font et se défont entre deux verres de synthale.

title: Pirate Bar
original_text:
"Ya hear that? Salazar's crew, they think we're cowardly dirt-eaters."
[shouting, booing]
"I say, I say they're wrong! I say we go out there and show 'em which way the Reaper flies! Who's with me?"
[cheering, stomping, breaking glass]
translated_text: L'éclairage est sombre, la musique forte et les armes mal dissimulées. Ici, les questions sont indiscrètes et les réponses souvent fatales.

title: Stellar Mirror
original_text: Ultra-light orbital mirror arrays which reflect and concentrate stellar energy were a common terraforming tool. The art of their use was brought to apogee by the Eridani-Utopia Terraforming Corporation during the height of the Domain's expansion.
translated_text: Une merveille d'ingénierie du Domain, le miroir stellaire concentre et redirige la lumière solaire pour réchauffer des mondes autrement trop froids pour l'habitation humaine.

title: Stellar Shade
original_text: Judicious placement of stellar shades and mirrors in orbit of Eventide allowed for ideal conditions in large pockets of the carefully maintained territory. The majority of the population was settled in leased urban cantons built in arcs and rings of the penumbrae surrounding the vast, bright aristocratic estate-plantations.
translated_text: Le pendant du miroir stellaire, le voile bloque une partie du rayonnement solaire pour refroidir des mondes autrement trop chauds, créant des zones habitables là où il n'y en aurait pas.

title: Hegemony Spacer Bar
original_text: A row of taps adorned the wall under bottles from every one of the Core Worlds - and a few from elsewhere. Merchant-captains mingled with off-duty officers at the bar, served by uniformed staff. In one corner a pack of navy cadets shouted and sang, desperate to enjoy their last shift of freedom.
translated_text: Une rangée de tireuses ornait le mur sous des bouteilles de chacun des Mondes Centraux — et de quelques autres. Les capitaines marchands se mêlaient aux officiers en permission au bar, servis par du personnel en uniforme. Dans un coin, une bande de cadets de la marine criait et chantait, désespérés de profiter de leur dernier quart de liberté.

title: Sindria
original_text: The hive-cities never recovered from the influx of refugees due to the Askonia Crisis. Andrada channelled resources toward the military and its supporting industries instead. A desperate underclass would grow beneath the boots of those lucky and loyal enough to have found positions in the bureaucracy or miltech establishment.
translated_text: Le joyau du Diktat, Sindria brûle de l'ambition d'Andrada et de la sueur de ses citoyens. Les raffineries de carburant illuminent le ciel nocturne d'une lueur perpétuelle.

title: Sindrian Diktat Spacer Bar
original_text: The dark entry left behind the noisome propaganda broadcasts of the throughway. Off-duty laborers drank away their ration credits at benches set beneath Diktat insignia. In one corner a cadre of finely dressed officer-bureaucrats called for a round. And even here a framed holo of the Lion of Sindria surveyed the ceiling, forever aloof.
translated_title: Bar de Spacers du Diktat Sindrien
translated_text: L'ordre et la discipline imprègnent même les lieux de détente du Diktat. Les portraits d'Andrada observent depuis chaque mur tandis que les spacers boivent avec une retenue calculée.

title: Tri-Tachyon Spacer Bar
original_text: The lounge was adorned in gilt geometrics. Columns underlit by cool light-tubes hung in the air. Slick careerists and wannabes in crisp suits negotiated deals while buying increasingly unlikely cocktails. A few spacers engaged in subdued drinking in the low seats, glancing uneasily at what was either abstract art or a holo-projection rig looming from the ceiling.
translated_text: Chrome, verre et lumière froide. Le bar Tri-Tachyon est aussi clinique que l'entreprise elle-même, bien que les conversations murmurées aux tables privées soient tout sauf stériles.

title: Gilead
original_text:
The face of Gilead smiled behind clouds of purest silk, cerulean seas, and verdant continents of gentle, rolling wilderness.

The Church reigned as a stern gardener, ensuring piety and duty in honoring the ground upon which Ludd once trod.
translated_text: Gilead est un monde sacré pour l'Église Luddic, un lieu de pèlerinage où les fidèles viennent chercher la rédemption et la guidance spirituelle.

title: Shrine of Jangala
original_text: There were figures, like an overgrown statue garden. The forms blistered with growth, draped in tendrils heavy with fruiting bodies. One moved. Not the wind, but a pilgrim exposed without a haz-suit. And there were others, wearing only light robes amongst the inimical xenolife. Easily overtaken.
translated_text: Un lieu de vénération au cœur de la station, où les fidèles Luddic prient pour la protection divine contre les périls du vide et les abominations de la technologie.
